items.title: Britney Spears goes into rehab after driving under the influence arrest
items.dek: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.body: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump attacks Pope over criticism of Iran war
items.dek: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".
items.body: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Crowds gather ahead of iconic Indian singer's funeral
items.dek: The singer, who died at the age of 92, will be cremated with full state honours on Monday.
items.body: The singer, who died at the age of 92, will be cremated with full state honours on Monday.
